title: When Life Gives You Tangerines — Jeju Route
drama: When Life Gives You Tangerines (당신, 거기 있어줄래요)
tip: Official 3-day tour route available from Jeju Tourism Organization. Rental car is not optional — most filming locations are inaccessible by public bus.
order_note: Day 1: Seongsan + Udo Island. Day 2: Seopjikoji + Gasiri. Day 3: Gimnyeong + Hyeopjae.

title: Goblin Route — Gangneung
transport: KTX from Seoul (1hr 30min). Local taxi recommended.
tip: KTX from Cheongnyangni or Seoul station direct to Gangneung. Note: Gangneung City Tour Bus service ended June 2025 — use taxi or Kakao Taxi.
order_note: Start with Jumunjin (30min from station by taxi) in the morning, then Gyeongpodae Lake area, end at Wolhwa Street for dinner.

title: Lovely Runner — Suwon Day Trip
transport: KTX 30min or Subway Line 1 direct from Seoul
tip: Best budget day trip from Seoul. The Hwahongmun water gate (화홍문) inside Hwaseong Fortress is the confession scene spot — don't miss it.
order_note: Arrive at Suwon Station → Montede Cafe for coffee → Hwaseong Fortress wall walk (2–3hrs) → Hwahongmun photo spot → Haenggung Palace → local 순대국밥 dinner.

title: BTS & HYBE — Seoul K-Pop Pilgrimage
transport: Subway only (all stops on major lines)
tip: Book HYBE INSIGHT tickets in advance — they sell out. Same day: take subway to Gangnam, walk K-Star Road, finish at COEX for Ktown4u shopping.
order_note: HYBE INSIGHT opens 10am (book first slot) → lunch near Hangang → Subway to Apgujeong → K-Star Road → COEX K-Pop Square → Ktown4u.

title: SM & aespa — Seongsu Pilgrimage
tip: KWANGYA @ Seoul is walk-in, no reservation needed. Check @kwangya_official Instagram for current popup artists. The whole Seongsu area is great for cafes.
order_note: Seongsu Station → KWANGYA @ Seoul → SM HQ exterior → NewJeans Bunny Mural (3min walk from exit 2) → Seongsu popup district → cafe tour.

title: Culinary Class Wars — Chef Restaurant Route
tip: Via Toledo: reservations open 10th and 25th of each month at midnight on CatchTable. Soigné: most foreigner-friendly. Budget option: 안동집 손칼국수 (cash only, ₩7,000).
order_note: Reserve Via Toledo or Soigné weeks ahead. For a budget version, 안동집 is walk-in only — go before 11:30am to avoid the queue.

title: Busan BTS & K-Pop Home Tour
transport: KTX from Seoul (2hrs 30min). Subway + taxi in Busan.
tip: Busan City Tour Bus: book on Klook (foreign card OK) — don't try to buy at the stop. ZM-ILLENNIAL Cafe is in Nam-gu, not Gwangalli — many maps show the wrong location.
order_note: Day 1: Gamcheon Culture Village (morning) → Gwangalli Beach sunset. Day 2: ZM-ILLENNIAL Cafe → Haeundae Beach → optional: Busan Station area.
